subject: A massive industrial chamber dominated by a looming mechanical construct with glowing eyes and sprawling pipe-limbs, flanked by glass tubes crackling with lightning, and a single small figure standing before it
description: A vast underground industrial space rendered in deep reds, oranges, and copper tones. At center is a large circular mechanical aperture or golem-head with glowing yellow eyes, surrounded by thick branching pipes that spread across the ceiling like tentacles. To the left and right, enormous glass cylinder tanks crackle with vivid blue-white lightning. A single small humanoid figure stands far below in the foreground, dwarfed entirely by the machinery. Fire or heat glow emanates from the aperture's center. The scale contrast between the figure and the machine is extreme.
foreground: small humanoid figure standing before industrial machinery
background: massive pipe construct with glowing mechanical eyes and lightning tubes
